query:
-- Total WaveSpeed dispatches across all jobs
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as totalScenesEver,
  SUM(CASE WHEN taskId LIKE 'wavespeed:%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as totalWavespeedDispatches
FROM musicVideoScenes;

-- Check job 510099 scenes for any signs of multiple taskIds (retries that cost credits)
SELECT sceneIndex, mvSceneStatus, taskId, errorMessage, updatedAt
FROM musicVideoScenes
WHERE jobId = 510099
ORDER BY sceneIndex;

-- Check job 510099 scenes for any signs of multiple taskIds (retries that cost credits)
SELECT sceneIndex, mvSceneStatus, taskId, errorMessage, updatedAt
FROM musicVideoScenes
